DEF MOTION FOR OR RELEASE, FILED
DEFT'S ADD TO CAL MOTION RECALL BENCH WARRANT OF 031219 -- FILED
/CAL:TRAILING #17002169 & DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/CTORD:DEFENDANT'S GPS IS TERMINATED AND REMOVED/CONTD:PHC IN DEPT, 23 & TRLG #17002169 IN DEPT, 22/DOP/

/CAL: DEFENSE'S MOTION FOR BAIL HEARING OR RELEASE ON O,R, (PRE-PX M20)/MOGRTD/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH AGPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO HOME DETENTION, NO DRUGS,/X: FUTURE DATES ARE CONFIRMED/

/CAL:PTC/X:LOVE WAIVER/X:OUTSIDE THE PRESENCE OF ADA, COURT CONDUCTS AN INCAMERA HEARING FOR MARSEN MOTION,/X:MARSDEN MOTION IS DENIED,/X:COURT CONFIRMS HEARING DATE OF 02-10-20,/4011,5/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:02-10-20/RET22/

/CAL:TO SET JURY TRIAL AND ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT MAY BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD//CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/ /X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/NTW/LD:07-08-19/CONTD:ACM PROGRESS REPORT, PRETRIAL AND JURY TRIAL/DOP/
